---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature.

**Why is this useful?**
What use case does this enable?

**Is this a YouTube API limitation?**
Check [API_GAPS.md](../../API_GAPS.md) — if the YouTube API doesn't support this, note it here.

**Suggested tool design**
If you have an idea for the tool interface:
- Tool name: `youtube_...` or `ytmusic_...`
- Parameters:
- Auth required: API key / OAuth / None
